message:
feat(codegen): Add callback patterns for labeled blocks in ExprEmitter

Extends ExprEmitter with:
- withLabeledBlock(): Callback pattern for labeled blocks (auto-closes)
- withLabeledBlockRaw(): Callback for blocks without temp var

Migrates misc.zig to use ExprEmitter:
- Tuple subscript with block base now uses labeledBlock
- Non-constant tuple index uses labeledBlock
- Attribute access on block expressions uses labeledBlock

Adds expr_emitter import to calls.zig (prep for future migration).

The labeled block patterns in calls.zig are more complex with conditional
logic and will be addressed in a future iteration.
